title: helichrysum citrispinum
intro: Helichrysum citrispinum, also known as the yellow fever bush or goldens, is a perennial shrub native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and promote tissue repair, making it a popular natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and digestive issues. Helichrysum citrispinum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
